<!-- Explain what this PR does and why -->

## Related Issue
<!-- Closes #<issue number> -->

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking — fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking — adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)

## Checklist
- [ ] Branched from `develop`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `black .` applied — no formatting issues
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes — no lint errors
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] New behaviour covered by at least one test
- [ ] Docstrings added / updated on changed public functions
- [ ] `README.md` / `CHANGELOG.md` updated if needed
- [ ] **No real malware behaviour introduced** (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md))
